prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock turbocharger (Garrett T3 .63 A/R) with a **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II (82mm, .96 A/R, ball-bearing)** paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** to support 650+ WHP on the **LC2 3.8L V6 (231ci) turbocharged engine**. Ensure the stock intercooler is upgraded to a **Vargas GC-02 bar-and-plate intercooler (4.5" thick core, 22" x 12" x 4.5")** with **Mishimoto silicone couplers (4-ply, reinforced)** to handle sustained boost levels of 28+ psi.

Fuel System: Swap the stock **Bosch fuel injectors (30 lb/hr)** for **ID1000x injectors (1000 cc/min, ethanol-compatible)** and pair with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (F90000267)**. Install a **Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger** to support E85 blends, and integrate a **Holt Performance adjustable fuel pressure regulator (0-100 psi)** for precise tuning via **HP Tuners VCM Suite (LC2-specific OS)**.

Drivetrain: Replace the stock **THM200-4R transmission** with a **4L80E (heavy-duty, 4-speed automatic)** built by **Monster Transmission (Stage 4, 300M input shaft, billet servo, 34-element sprag)**. Pair with a **PML 300M torque converter (2,800 stall, 30-spline)** and a **G-Force GSR-3R differential (9-inch, 3.73:1 gear ratio, posi-traction)** to handle the increased torque. Strengthen the half-shafts with **Mark Williams Enterprises 33-spline axles (4340 chromoly, heat-treated)** and a **Strange Engineering S60 rear end (35-spline, nodular iron case)**.
estetica: Body Kit: Install the **RK Sport GNX Extreme Widebody Kit (fiberglass, bolt-on, 3" fender flares)** with **custom-molded carbon fiber front splitter (3M 2216 adhesive-mounted)** and a **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (PETG, integrated LED brake light)**. Replace the stock hood with a **Carbon Creations GT-style hood (dual vents, 50% weight reduction)** and add **AeroCatch hood latches (quick-release, stainless steel)** for track use.

Wheels & Tires: Mount **Forgeline GA3R wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x12 +35 rear, 3-piece forged, 22 lbs each)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**. Use **HRE FlowForm FF01 centers (matte bronze, 5x115 bolt pattern)** and **ARP extended wheel studs (1/2"-20, 2.5" length)** for secure fitment. Add **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors, two-piece floating, slotted)** with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for aggressive stopping power.

Interior & Aero: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved, 6-point harness slots)** and add a **Sparco 6-point harness (ASM-compliant, cam-lock)**. Install a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub)** and a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, EGT, wideband AFR)**. For aerodynamics, add **Vortex Generators (3M VHB tape-mounted, 2" tall)** on the roof and a **custom carbon fiber rear wing (dual-element, 60" span, adjustable angle)** with **AeroCatch mounts (quick-release, aluminum)**.
